name: Competition & Legal Service
description: Antitrust (Arts. 101–102 TFEU), state aid (Arts. 107–109 TFEU), and Commission Legal Service opinions and litigation.

skills.description: Personalise this plugin to your unit, case type, and working language
Arts. 101–102 TFEU analysis, SO drafting, fines calculation, dawn raids
Art. 107–109 TFEU four-limb test, GBER screening, recovery calculation
CLS legal opinions, litigation management, Written Observations, risk assessment
Screen a measure against GBER categories — all conditions, incentive effect, cumulation
Apply SSNIP test, define relevant product and geographic market for Art. 101/102/merger
Art. 107(1) four-limb test, de minimis, GBER screening, compatibility assessment workflow
EU Merger Regulation — SIEC test, jurisdictional thresholds, Phase I/II, remedies design
Competition inspection defence — LPP claims, employee rights, document log, post-inspection obligations
Art. 340(2) TFEU non-contractual liability — Bergaderm three-limb test, damage assessment, MS Francovich liability
